'''''Star Wars Weekly'' 47''' is the forty-seventh issue in the ''[[Star Wars Weekly]]'' series of comic reprints, published on [[December 27]], [[1978]].

==Contents==
*"[[Untitled Pizzazz 1 comic|Untitled comic]]"
*"[[Untitled Pizzazz 2 comic|Untitled comic]]"
*"[[Dread Discovery!]]"
*"Tales of the Watcher: The sacrifice!"
*"The power of Warlock Part 3: The secret of the Magus!"
